title: athyrium pseudofluviale
intro: Athyrium pseudofluviale, also known as the pseudofluid fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Athyrium genus. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Athyrium pseudofluviale include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
